global_rules.no_ecommerce: CRITICAL: NO shopping cart, checkout, payment, or order placement flows. This is a catalogue and enquiry generation website.
global_rules.cta_strategy: Every product must prominently feature 'Enquire Now', 'WhatsApp', or 'Get Quote' buttons.
global_rules.brand_feel: Friendly, approachable, trustworthy, and modern. Do NOT position as a high-end luxury brand. Needs to appeal to middle-class families, students, and B2B.

secondary.description: WhatsApp Green - Crucial for immediate, informal B2C/B2B enquiries.

accent.description: Sage Green - Used for secondary highlights, tags, and 'New Arrival' badges.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-text-secondary

buttons.primary: bg-primary-default text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#1EBE5C] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-surface-default text-text-primary border border-border-default rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-text-secondary transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.ghost: text-primary-default hover:bg-primary-light rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

product_card.structure: Image on top (aspect-square, rounded-xl, object-cover), Content below.
product_card.content: Title (h4), Category label, Dimensions/Material summary, and Action area.
product_card.actions: Full-width 'Enquire Now' button, and an icon-only or half-width 'WhatsApp' button. NO ADD TO CART.
product_card.style: bg-surface-default p-4 rounded-2xl border border-border-default group hover:border-primary-default transition-all

category_tile.structure: Square or rectangular tile, background image with subtle dark gradient overlay, white text on top.
category_tile.hover: Image slightly scales up (scale-105 transition-transform duration-500)

enquiry_form.fields: Name, Phone Number, Email, Select Product/Category, Message.
enquiry_form.style: bg-surface-default p-6 md:p-8 rounded-2xl border border-border-default shadow-sm
enquiry_form.inputs: bg-background-default border border-border-default rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-default focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all w-full

floating_whatsapp.style: bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center

Home.hero: Split layout: Left side bold typography (Tagline + Value Props) and primary Enquire CTA. Right side overlapping rounded images of modern living rooms.
Home.categories: Grid of prominent categories (Living Room, Bedroom, Dining, etc.)
Home.features: Why Choose Wodmin? (Affordable, Reliable, Durable, Modern) with icons.
Home.collections: Carousels for Best Sellers and Budget Collections.
Home.b2b_banner: Full-width section calling out Dealers & Wholesalers with a distinctive dark or primary background.
Home.testimonials: Carousel of text reviews + customer faces.

Category_Listing.layout: Sidebar for filters (Price range, Material, Color). Main area for Product Grid.

Product_Detail.layout: Split layout: Left side Image Gallery (Main image + thumbnails). Right side Details.
Product_Detail.details: Product Title, SKU, Short Description, Dimensions, Material, Colors available. Large action block: 'Enquire Now' & 'WhatsApp'.
Product_Detail.accordions: Specifications, Warranty & Care, Delivery Info, FAQs.

Wholesale.hero: Focus on B2B benefits: bulk discounts, dedicated support, custom orders.
Wholesale.form: Large, detailed enquiry form capturing business type (dealer, builder, corporate).

motion.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward translation (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0) using framer-motion.
motion.hover_states: Soft scaling (scale 1.02) on product cards and category tiles. Button background color shifts.
motion.scroll_reveals: Staggered fade-up for grid items to make the page feel alive and polished.

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing_attributes.convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='enquire-now-button', data-testid='whatsapp-floating-btn', data-testid='product-card-title'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind config with the provided color hexes as CSS variables (e.g. primary, secondary, background, surface, text-primary). 2. Add Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' to index.html and configure them in Tailwind. 3. Ensure NO e-commerce cart elements are present. 4. Build reusable UI components (Enquiry Form, Product Card without cart buttons) utilizing lucide-react for icons. 5. Prioritize generous spacing (p-6, p-8) and rounded corners (rounded-2xl) to create a friendly, accessible, modern feel.
